title: Inner join two tables with named bindings
prompt: Write `MyApp.Blog.posts_with_category_named/0` that inner-joins posts with their category and names both bindings: `as: :post` on the base and `as: :category` on the join. Return `select: {p.title, c.name}`. Write to `lib/my_app/blog.ex`.
tier_rationale: Mechanical application of `as:` on both sides of a simple inner-join.
